title.title: Job title
title.description: Optional LinkedIn job keywords, for example: Software Engineer.

location.title: Job location
location.description: Optional LinkedIn location text, for example: United States or New York, NY.

companyName.title: Company name
companyName.description: Optional case-insensitive company name filter applied after scraping search cards.

companyId.title: Company ID
companyId.description: Optional LinkedIn company IDs used through the LinkedIn f_C filter, for example Uber: 1815218.

rows.title: Rows per page
rows.description: Number of jobs to return for the requested page.

pageNumber.title: Page number
pageNumber.description: 1-based page number of the filtered job results to return.

contractType.title: Job type
contractType.description: Filter by LinkedIn job type codes.

experienceLevel.title: Experience level
experienceLevel.description: Filter by LinkedIn experience level codes.

proxy.title: Proxy configuration
proxy.description: Optional Apify proxy configuration. Leave empty to scrape without a proxy.
